name: Modular Assembly Unit
oracle_text:
Combine.
Whenever ~ is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, energize.
flavor_text: Individual components are mere scrap; together, they become the foundation of a titan.
design_notes: Designed for the BG (Combiner Protocol) archetype. While the slot brief specified 'artifact', I have designed this as an 'Artifact Creature' to ensure the 'Combine' mechanic is functionally sound; since Combine returns the card with +1/+1 counters, the permanent must be a creature for those counters to matter. At uncommon CMC 4, it provides a mid-sized piece of the engine that supports both the recursion aspect of Combine and the resource management (Energon) theme by providing fuel when it is sacrificed or destroyed.
